# AI Codebase Map: Social & Utility Suite
This document serves as the absolute context map for any AI model reading, debugging, or modifying this repository.

## 1. Project Overview
- Owner: Chimeremeze Wisdom Nwachukwu (Username: chimeremezewisdom1001-max)
- Repository: ai-agency-portal
- Platform Type: Serverless Static Web Suite (HTML/JS/CSS) hosted on GitHub Pages
- Global Database: Supabase (Project ID: zmniyeokodyckfsxinmc)
- Primary Gateways: Flutterwave Checkout, OPay Wallet, Bybit Crypto deposits, Adsterra

## 2. Shared Architecture Rules
- No Node.js Backend: The live site runs purely in the client browser.
- No Hardcoded Variables: Global API endpoints, ad scripts, and payment links must load dynamically from config.json.
- Compact Code Limit: Because the developer edits on an Android mobile device, all HTML files must remain strictly under 305 lines of code to prevent mobile clipboard or browser input cut-off.

## 3. Database Table Schemas (Supabase)
- Table "posts": columns (id, created_at, author [text], content [text], media_url [text])
- Table "messages": columns (id, created_at, sender [text], text [text])
- Table "referrals": columns (id, created_at, referrer_username [text], new_user_ip [text])
- Table "payments_claims": columns (id, created_at, sender_name [text], payment_method [text], amount_value [text], details_or_code [text], status [text])
- Table "inventory_logs": columns (id, created_at, item_barcode [text], item_name [text], qty_count [int])

## 4. File Inventory Map
- index.html: Master responsive dashboard with Google Translate and categorized suites.
- config.json: Central configuration dictionary (Adsterra URL, Flutterwave Link, local OPay details, local Sterling Bank details).
- social.html: Real-time global chat and social feed connected to Supabase.
- tasks-refer.html: WhatsApp referral link generator and coin claim desk.
- tools-easypay.html: The Open-Layout billing checkout desk.
- tools-donation.html: Direct Bybit crypto deposit wallet listings (TRC-20, BTC).
- tools-buy-crypto.html: Embedded Transak credit-card to TRC-20 crypto on-ramp.
- tools-diagnostics.html: System health checker (tests config, database pings, and storage).
- tools-habits.html: Daily Habit Tools 1-7 (Water log, journal, step burner, checklist, calculator).
- tools-student.html: Science & Periodic Table suite (states, atomic mass, protons, neutrons, electrons).
- tools-business.html: POS Cash Book Ledger, invoicing, and PAYE tax calculator.
- tools-utility-pro.html: Pomodoro focus timer with programmatically synthesized focus audio.
- tools-converter-pro.html: Image quality compressor (max 5MB) and text-to-PDF / JSON-to-CSV blob exporter.

## 5. Coding Guidelines for AI Modifiers
- Always use the unique Supabase variable name `const db = supabase.createClient(...)` instead of `let supabase` to prevent reference shadowing errors.
- Never write placeholder texts (like PUT_YOUR_KEY_HERE) unless requested. Always use the active verified keys stored in config.json.
- Always provide the user with direct "Delete" and "Create" GitHub links using the `?filename=` query format to make deployment completely hassle-free on Android.
